pi_items.source: Task description and task.json metadata field match this path exactly

Task description specifies: 1) Line Chart (Sales_Amount over Sale_Date by Product_Category), 2) Clustered Bar Chart (Sales_Amount by Region by Customer_Type), 3) Card visual for Avg_Sale_Value measure
Task description states 'a new DAX measure named Avg_Sale_Value defined as: DIVIDE(SUM(sales_data[Sales_Amount]), COUNTROWS(sales_data))'
CSV file contains both fields. Task description uses Product_Category for line chart small multiples and Customer_Type for bar chart small multiples
File exists at benchmarks/cua_world/environments/power_bi_desktop_env/data/sales_data.csv with 1000 rows and 14 columns matching Kaggle dataset columns exactly
Kaggle dataset page (https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/vinothkannaece/sales-dataset) confirms CC0 license

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real public data from Kaggle (vinothkannaece/sales-dataset, CC0 license) containing 1000 sales records with 14 columns. Required data fields (Product_Category, Customer_Type, Region, Sale_Date, Sales_Amount) are all present. The task requires building a Power BI report with three visuals: a line chart split by Product_Category, a clustered bar chart split by Customer_Type, and a card displaying a DAX measure (Avg_Sale_Value = DIVIDE(SUM(Sales_Amount), COUNTROWS(data))). The report must be saved as 'Small_Multiples_Report.pbix' on the Desktop with a page named 'Category Comparison'. Verifier requires 70+ points out of 100 for task success.
